Home Make a Submission?

Salsa

Janet Caldwell

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

3 tomatoes, chopped OR 2 cans tomatoes ½ c finely diced onion 3 jalapeno peppers OR 5 serrano chiles, finely chopped ½ c chopped cilantro OR parsley 1 tsp salt 2 tsp lime juice OR juice of 1 lime

Directions

Stir together or process for a smoother salsa. Suggested additions: Garlic 2 Tbsp ketchup Hot sauce Cumin Sugar
